description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided toolbox with a hinged lid, constructed from a dark, marbled metal material. The exterior is adorned with several colorful stickers and labels, including a prominent green and white emblem on the lid and smaller decals on the front and side panels. The box features robust, rectangular metal handles on the sides for carrying, and two metal latch mechanisms on the front for securing the lid. The interior is a single, open compartment, visible when the lid is open, with no internal trays or dividers apparent. The surface of the toolbox is slightly textured, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A dark, metal rectangular toolbox with side handles, front latches, and colorful stickers on its exterior. The lid opens to reveal a single, open compartment inside.
description_view_0: Front and top of the toolbox are visible, showing the open lid, two front latches, side handles, and several stickers including a large emblem on the lid.
description_view_1: Side and top view with the lid partially open, highlighting the side handle and the large green and white sticker on the lid.
description_view_2: Rear and top view, showing the closed and open toolbox, with the lid's sticker and a side handle visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear view with the lid open, displaying the interior compartment and the arrangement of stickers on the lid and side.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, fixed metal handles on each side, designed for carrying; no ergonomic padding or folding features visible.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing metal clasp latches, likely snap-type, with no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_brand_logo: A large green and white emblem resembling a stylized flower or propeller is present on the lid; no readable brand text is visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment with no visible trays, bins, or dividers; compartment is open and unobstructed.
attribute_external_labeling: Green and white emblem on lid
Rectangular label with text on front
